payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Vertical dark-wood picture frame containing a blue-dominated, heavily textured oil-style painting showing a night sky with stars and yellow lights reflected on water; the frame edges are visible and the crop is slightly edge-cropped at the sides, photo likely taken from about 1.5 meters away.
attributes: depicts night sky and water reflections
narrow frame visible left and right

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"dark-wood picture frame, edge-cropped","long_description":"Vertical dark-wood picture frame containing a blue-dominated, heavily textured oil-style painting showing a night sky with stars and yellow lights reflected on water; the frame edges are visible and the crop is slightly edge-cropped at the sides, photo likely taken from about 1.5 meters away.","attributes":["dark wood frame","vertical rectangular orientation","edge-cropped / partial","blue-dominated color palette","visible brushstrokes / oil texture","depicts night sky and water reflections","narrow frame visible left and right","moderate indoor lighting"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
